body.title: [in_progress] Inference router: migrate consumers to resolve(); retire (tier->model->provider) triples + ModelSpec.source_name
body.intention: I intend that every inference consumer dispatches through the dimensional resolver and no hardcoded (task_class, model_id, source_name) triple or 1:1 ModelSpec.source_name binding remains.
body.description:
The CUTOVER (do LAST, after resolver-compose is green) of D-inference-router-stack-decomposition-2026-07-08. Additive-then-cutover: only now do we switch consumers and delete the monolith.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py (proxy entry -> resolve()); unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/{consolidation,distillation}.py + tools/after_action_reviewer.py (any direct route() callers -> dimensional API); unseen_university/devices/scraps/jobs/routing_compiler.py (emit dimensional POLICY, not triples) + its add_compiled_rule counterpart in rules_engine.py; rules_engine.py (remove _DEFAULT_RULES triples + the triple form of add_compiled_rule); models_registry.py (remove the source_name binding); tests updated across tests/inference/.
**Design rules:** inference-proxy-only; inference-tier-not-model; docs-live-in-code; test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** repoint consumers + compiler to the dimensional API, THEN delete triples + source_name. HIGH-INERTIA (device.py, load-bearing proxy Igor consumes) — pause for Akien inline pre-approval before editing device.py; stamp approval into this ticket.
**Test plan:** device.py dispatch resolves via resolve() end-to-end; a live dispatch returns text (proxy up throughout); `git grep` finds NO (task_class, model_id, source_name) triple in the rules stack and no ModelSpec.source_name; full tests/inference/ + tests/granny/ green. Red (triples still present) -> green (removed, resolver serving).
**Rollback:** revert the cutover commit — the additive resolver + stacks remain; route()+triples were only deleted in this ticket, so revert restores the working monolith. No dispatch-down window.
**Logging:** log each consumer cutover crossing at INFO; log triple-removal as a state change.
**Depends on:** T-inference-resolver-compose.
**Observability:** a live dispatch returning text + the no-triple grep are the runtime signals the cutover shipped.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: CLOSED PROVEN (proof cc.0.inference-router-cutover-every-consumer @441076bf, red=AssertionError -> green=passed). Every consumer dispatches through the dimensional resolver; _DEFAULT_RULES triples + RoutingRule + route() + add_compiled_rule + _is_night_mode + by_source + seed_from_models + ModelSpec.source_name all DELETED. connections.py holds the authoritative 24-edge table (sole home of reachability, self-contained) = union of the 22 source_name bindings + the 2 triple-only owned-local Hex edges (devstral-small-2:24b@ollama, qwen3-coder-next@ollama) that seeding from source_name alone would have silently dropped; phantom qwen/qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct@openrouter dropped (no ModelSpec). select() bridges task_class->ticket_tier and calls resolve(); resolve() gained session affinity (evaluator/minion pass real session_ids). device.py wires connections + policies=[] EXPLICITLY: policies=None false-halts the coding escalation ladder (verified: resolve(worker/coding, required_difficulty=design) -> deepseek-r1:32b@ollama under policies=[] matching old route(), vs None+system_alarm under policies=None). Hop-0 divergence (worker/coding -> deepseek-r1:14b not devstral) is the decision's AUTHORIZED 'tiers are hints' behavior; restoring the agentic-coder floor needs real tool-capability data -> T-inference-activate-coding-tools-policy. Night-gate deferred -> T-inference-batch-nightgate-in-resolver. Inference suite 433 passed; 3 pre-existing failures ticketed.
